mentions.note: CEO Rob Lynch executing turnaround: restaurant margins 22.6%, build costs down 20%, labor efficiency gains, protected customer relationship vs. aggressive peers. Revenue/profit accelerating. Stock up 23% YTD but further upside as execution compounds; beef price main risk.
Turnaround underway; Lynch executing operational improvements; expect strong Q1 2026 earnings but beef prices remain headwind risk.
Caller Bill lost $20K buying at $121; new CEO Rob Lynch represents fundamental change; transformation story warrants bullish stance despite past weakness.
